name: 阿彻行车记录文件夹
reference_prompt: A light gray cardboard A4-sized folder (approximately 30cm x 21cm), standard folder cover structure, clean and new condition, no visible text or labels, isolated on white background, front and three-quarter angle views.。源记录硬约束：数量:1；位置:石川手持从抽屉取出；运动政策:tiny取出放置桌面。源记录硬约束：数量:1；位置:桌面中央；运动政策:静止
